$comment: x-2901: the W7 oneOf split-brain is retired. Both emitters (Python/fno and Rust/fno-agents) now write this single envelope {ts, type, source, data}. The legacy Rust {ts, kind, <flat>} shape is no longer valid on the wire; subscribe/digest keep a read-side kind/flat fallback for the mixed-binary + rotated-history window (an old daemon binary keeps writing kind lines until fno restart). See docs/architecture/events-schema-contract.md.
title: events.jsonl line (v3)
description: One line of events.jsonl. The unified Python/fno + Rust/fno-agents envelope: type (not kind), payload nested under data.

type.description: Event type name from events-schema.yaml event_types

source.description: Producer identity: a fixed-string source from the enum, or a per-agent worker (worker:<id> / stream-worker:<id>). Derived from the real EventEmitter::new call sites.
